name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-rkp

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-rkp
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Rkp SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Rkp SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-rkp
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common rkp
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.rkp.v20191209.rkp_client.RkpClient.GetOpenId
documentation:
产品侧确认风险探针已停售，无收入，并且已经停服。目前服务使用自建redis，不符合规范需要整改下线。

根据DevicceToken查询OpenID。

```
param request

Request instance for GetOpenId.

type request



rtype

```

methods.name: tencentcloud.rkp.v20191209.rkp_client.RkpClient.QueryDevAndRisk
documentation:
产品侧确认风险探针已停售，无收入，并且已经停服。目前服务使用自建redis，不符合规范需要整改下线。

腾讯天御设备风险查询接口，输入由客户应用自主采集的设备信息， 通过腾讯大数据风控能力，可以准确根据输入设备信息，还原设备库中的设备ID，并且识别设备的风险，解决客户业务过程中的设备风险，降低企业损失。

```
param request

Request instance for QueryDevAndRisk.

type request



rtype

```
